draft:
Dear Ms. Whitaker,

Thank you for reaching out. We understand you are requesting a loss run for the Hendricks account going back five years.

Our team is looking into this and will follow up with you shortly regarding the availability of this document.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The client's stated amount was not confirmed as no amount was on file. The draft acknowledges the request and states a team member will follow up.
